caption: Tolkien's [calligraphy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calligraphy) of the [Ring Verse](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ring_Verse) was one of the few illustrations in the first edition. It is written in the [Black Speech](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Black_Speech) of [Mordor](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mordor) using the [Tengwar](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tengwar) script.
alt: Tolkien's [calligraphy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calligraphy) of the [Ring Verse](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ring_Verse) was one of the few illustrations in the first edition. It is written in the [Black Speech](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Black_Speech) of [Mordor](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mordor) using the [Tengwar](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tengwar) script.
